headline: Molson Coors Beverage (TAP) Joins Russell Indexes As Its Undervalued Narrative Stays In Focus
summary: Molson Coors Beverage (TAP) has been added to both the Russell 2500 Index and the Russell 2500 Value Benchmark, a move that can affect how index funds and institutional investors treat the stock. See our latest analysis for Molson Coors Beverage. Against this index inclusion backdrop, Molson Coors Beverage’s share price has moved only modestly in the short term, with a 7 day share price return of 0.80%, while its year to date share price return is down 17.15% and the 1 year total shareholder...

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Anheuser-Busch, Diageo, Constellation Brands, Brown-Forman and Molson Coors Beverage
summary: BUD, DEO, STZ, BF.B and TAP are adapting to changing consumer preferences through innovation, premiumization and expanding low-alcohol offerings.

headline: Molson Coors (TAP) Stock Looks Reasonable On Sales But Stretched On Growth
summary: Molson Coors Beverage stock has had a tough few years, with the share price drifting while many of the valuation checks still suggest the company screens as relatively cheap against its fundamentals. Over the last 3 years, Molson Coors Beverage shareholders have seen the stock decline about 32.5%, which sets a low bar for what counts as a convincing recovery. The push into Beyond Beer products such as ready to drink cocktails may support higher growth expectations, but there is still a risk...

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $41
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $43 to $41.

headline: How Index Additions And EMEA Leadership Shuffle At Molson Coors (TAP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late June 2026, Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) was added to both the Russell 2500 Index and the Russell 2500 Value Benchmark, while also announcing a temporary medical leave for its EMEA&APAC CEO and the appointment of an interim regional leader. This combination of index inclusions and leadership reshuffling in key international markets could influence how investors assess Molson Coors’ visibility, governance stability, and regional execution priorities. Next, we’ll explore how...
